coverage_goal: Collect eventing results for all countries and all eventing levels, prioritizing data.fei for international results and supplementing with national-event sources.

all_countries.description: Every country that publishes eventing results through a national federation, association, league, or event organizer.

all_fei_member_nations.description: Every FEI member nation represented in data.fei.org eventing results.

all_fei_europe_member_nations.description: European FEI member nations with national federation eventing calendars and result portals.

sources.name: FEI Database
sources.notes: Primary eventing source. Use before national sources whenever a result appears in the FEI database.

sources.name: European national federation results
sources.notes: Discover and connect national federation calendars and result portals for European FEI member nations across every national eventing level.

sources.name: British Eventing results
sources.notes: High-priority national-event source for UK coverage across every British Eventing level.

sources.name: Equestrian Australia eventing results
sources.notes: High-priority national-event source for Australian coverage across every national eventing level.

sources.name: Equestrian Sports New Zealand eventing results
sources.notes: High-priority national-event source for New Zealand coverage across every national eventing level.

sources.name: United States Eventing Association results
sources.notes: High-priority national-event source for USA coverage across every USEA-recognized level.

sources.name: All national federation results
sources.notes: Backfill national events for every country and every national eventing level after higher-priority regions are covered.
